Summary: Course development dashboard and worksheet app

Added deployment workflow for GitHub Pages hosting
Supabase real-time commenting system; course configuration cleanup; multi-course support
Text selection highlighting with comment threads; URL-based auto-identity for commenters
Dashboard button to share worksheet link with faculty
index.html redirect to dashboard; custom ASU burgundy favicon

Bug fixes: commenting UX and data persistence; text entry tab in activity content areas; add activity button; comments posting to Supabase; export/download document; textbook field population; favicon update. Established CHANGELOG.md

Activity/material data model with localStorage persistence; assignments overview with card/table toggle and cross-module drag; materials overview with card/table toggle and cross-module drag; content accordion UX improvements; switchAttachTab nesting fix

Fix: accordion collapse when adding activity (cards stay open). Fix: cross-container text highlighting. Objectives: interactive objective picker in assignment overview; hover tooltips showing full objective text; course objectives (CLO/ELO) accordion at top of page; module MLO accordion in each card. Content: inline upload/link/template expansion in assignment and materials overview; template dropdown (Discussion/Assignment/Quiz/Blank Page); Google Drive export button on all templates. Quiz: modern interactive quiz builder with question cards; multiple choice/true-false/short answer types; correct answer toggle; per-question feedback fields; AI quiz question generation via Claude API. Rubrics: AI-powered rubric generation (Canvas-compatible format); rubric section added to discussion template. Accessibility: upload zones show PowerPoint vs PDF guidance and heading/alt-text tips
